text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Woe is me... A tragic defeat!<n>However, setbacks
are the essence<n>of a good story. The mighty foe
will<n>have their just desserts at the next
engagement.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
I've realized this loss owes to my<n>being a merciful
king. The<n>compassion I feel for others is too<n>great.
I repent this passivity and look<n>to seize my
generation's throne.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Thus, I advance my pieces onward to<n>the
Japanese Derby, a fitting venue<n>to further bolster
my name!
